issues: FACTUAL ERROR: EBM GOP 01439 listed as 'Arzt-Patienten-Kontakt per Video' is incorrect. GOP 01439 was deleted from the EBM on 1 October 2019. It no longer exists. Current video consultation billing uses the patient group-specific Versicherten-, Grund- oder Konsiliarpauschalen with an add-on technik code (GOP 01450). Listing 01439 as a valid current billing code in an EBM section (Stand 2025/2026) is misleading.

GOP 01450 (Technische Kosten): confirmed as valid and current — the central Technikzuschlag for all Videosprechstunden. Value: 40 Punkte, currently subject to Höchstwert 700 Punkte/Quartal (confirmed by KVB Vergütungsübersicht Stand 01.01.2026).
DigiG 30%-Begrenzung aufgehoben: confirmed correct. DigiG came into effect 26 March 2024 and removed the 30% quota for individual EBM services.
Ab 1. April 2025: bis zu 50 Prozent Behandlungsfälle per Video: confirmed by KVB sources (ab Q2/2025).
Assisted Telemedizin via Apotheken: confirmed as introduced by DigiG (2024), still in Einführungsphase 2025/2026.
Anlage 31b BMV-Ä URL cited in Quellen: confirmed live at gkv-spitzenverband.de.
KV Nordrhein source URL (kvno.de): confirmed plausible and alive.
Frontmatter relevance: valid sectors and interests.
11 wiki-links, all relevant. Required sections present.
articles.fixInstructions: In the EBM-Abrechnung subsection, replace the bullet point 'Arzt-Patienten-Kontakt per Video (GOP 01439 EBM)' with: 'Technikzuschlag Videosprechstunde (GOP 01450 EBM, 40 Punkte, Höchstwert 700 Punkte/Quartal)' and 'Abrechnung über die fachgruppenspezifische Versicherten-, Grund- oder Konsiliarpauschale (kein eigener Kontaktzuschlag mehr seit Oktober 2019)'. Remove all references to GOP 01439 as it was deleted from the EBM on 1 October 2019.

issues: SGB V enacted 1989 via Gesundheits-Reformgesetz: confirmed. The law is formally the 'Gesetz zur Strukturreform im Gesundheitswesen (Gesundheits-Reformgesetz - GRG)' from 20 December 1988, in force 1 January 1989. Article says 'Gesundheits-Reformgesetzes' — correct.

'Zwölf Kapitel' description alongside 'Elfte Kapitel': the article mentions both 'zwölf Kapitel (Bücher)' and 'Elfte Kapitel (Telematikinfrastruktur, §§ 306 bis 395)'. SGB V does not have Bücher internally — it has Kapitel. Minor structural imprecision.
§§ 217a ff. SGB V as basis for GKV-Spitzenverband: confirmed correct.

issues: BMG holds 51% of gematik since DVG 2019: confirmed by multiple sources. Note: the 51% acquisition was via the TSVG (Terminservice- und Versorgungsgesetz), which was closely linked to the DVG; article attributes it to DVG 2019, which is the correct legislation for the digital health context.
Nine gematik Gesellschafter: confirmed — BMG, KBV, KZBV, BÄK, Bundeszahnärztekammer, DAV, DKG, GKV-SV, PKV.
GKV-SV 22,05 Prozent: confirmed by gematik.de Gesellschafter page and GKV search results.

Restliche 19,95 Prozent verteilen sich auf sechs Verbände: confirmed — 6 non-BMG/non-GKV-SV/non-PKV shareholders each hold a fraction of the remaining 26,95% minus GKV-SV's 22,05% leaves 26,95% for 7 non-BMG members. Note: the math is: 100 - 51 (BMG) - 22.05 (GKV-SV) - 7.0 (PKV) = 19.95% for remaining 6 shareholders. Confirmed correct.

issues: DSGVO 'trat am 25. Mai 2018 in Kraft': confirmed. The DSGVO (EU) 2016/679 was adopted 2016 but entered into application 25 May 2018 — EUR-Lex confirms this.

Art. 9 Abs. 2 exceptions listed: lit. a, h, i — confirmed correct.
